docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY FISHMAN, JOSHUA AS TO DEFENDANT TURO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 69.50 SERVED JAN-27-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TURO, INC.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHMAN, JOSHUA
DECLARATION RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FISHMAN, JOSHUA
ORDER RE REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THE PLAINTIFF JOSHUA FISHMAN CALLED DEPARTMENT 506 AND INFORMED THE CLERK THAT THE DEFENDANT TURO, INC. CONTACTED HIM AND THE CASE HAS SETTLED. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT HE WOULD NOT BE APPEARING VIA COURTCALL AT THE CALENDARED HEARING DATE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JOSHUA FISHMAN. NO APPEARANCE BY TURO, INC. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/3/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO THE ORDER SIGNED ON 12/03/21 BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG.
